samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse Detection Module: Detects rising edges of data_in and generates a pulse output data_out.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        Always block sensitive to the positive edge of clk and negative edge of rst_n.
        In the reset condition (~rst_n), initialize state to 0 and set data_out to 0.
        For each state, check data_in and transition to the next state based on its value.
        Set data_out to 1 when transitioning from state 3 to state 0, indicating the end of a pulse.
        Otherwise, set data_out to 0.
    </implementation>
</module>
